consumer_hint: Node v166 rollback window readiness checklist
scope: restore compatibility handoff sample for binary, WAL, Snapshot, and fixture compatibility confirmation

manual_confirmations.handoff_boundary: binary compatibility confirmation only; it does not switch traffic or approve production rollback
WAL compatibility can explain mini-kv replay risk but cannot repair Java transaction state
snapshot LOAD is not executed by this sample and would replace the in-memory store if run manually
fixtures describe evidence shape and compatibility expectations; they are not restore scripts

expected: CHECKJSON LOAD reports store_replace_from_snapshot without executing LOAD
CHECKJSON COMPACT reports wal_rewrite_when_enabled without executing COMPACT
CHECKJSON SETNXEX reports write risks without executing token claim

boundaries: does not run Java or Node
not connected to Java transaction chain
restore compatibility cannot create Java order authority
production restore approval remains outside mini-kv fixture

warnings: Node v166 may consume this handoff only after Java v57 and mini-kv v66 are complete
restore compatibility evidence is not a restore executor
WAL/Snapshot restore cannot create Java order authority
pause_conditions: needs Node to auto-start Java or mini-kv
needs mini-kv in Java transaction consistency chain
restore target or version compatibility is unclear
